properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Way maker, Miracle worker, Promise keeper, Light in the darkness, My God, That is who You are. Way maker, Miracle worker,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Promise keeper, Light in the darkness, My God, That is who You are.

verse.name: v4
v5
v6
verse.lines: Way maker, Miracle worker, Promise keeper, Light in the darkness, My God, That is who You are.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: (That is who You are) That is who You are. [4x]

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Way maker, Miracle worker, Promise keeper, Light in the darkness, My God, That is who You are.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: (That is who You are) That is who You are. [4x]

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: (Heal us who You are) That is who You are. [4x]

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: (Way Maker's who You are) That is who You are. [4x]

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: (That is who You are) That is who You are.

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Even when I don't see it, You're working. Even when I don't feel it, You're working. You never stop, You never stop working. [2x]
